name: Path resolve must block abs + ..
goal: `pkg/paths.py::resolve_under` must keep results under root: reject absolute second parts and `..` segments. `pkg/assets.py` uses it.
inspired_by: Pattern: path traversal via absolute join / .. (static servers).
agent_prompt_notes: Visible scaffold only. Hidden tests are NOT provided to the agent. Do not search for or open hidden_tests/.
